strategy: Solo-friendly (11,705 health). Do not trap or weaken him: any trap or harmful charm makes him cast Sacrifice to recover. Stack blades instead.
He resists Death 50% and takes only +10% from Life, so hit with a strong off-Death school and blade heavily rather than trapping.
Expect Dark Fiend, a shadow hit, and a Bad Juju into Sacrifice chain, so keep a shield or resist up.
Enter on time: joining late gets you Bad Juju.
Set up a trap-free burst with blades, then land one big hit.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets the late wizard hit with Bad Juju.
Any trap or weakness placed on him makes him cast Sacrifice to recover. Skip traps and weaknesses.
He casts Dark Fiend, a shadow attack.
After Bad Juju he follows up with another Sacrifice.
